items.title: Morgan Rogers takes brutal swipe at Arsenal after choosing Chelsea over them as he completes £117m transfer
items.summary: MORGAN ROGERS has taken a cheeky dig at Arsenal after signing for Premier League rivals Chelsea. The Aston Villa attacker completed a monster £117million move on Tuesday which made him the most expensive British transfer ever. And he wasted no time in ingratiating himself with the Stamford Bridge fa

items.title: Kelly promises to let loose in 'spiteful' takedown of Agyarko
items.summary: Josh Kelly has promised that his IBF light-middleweight title defence against Caoimhin Agyarko will be "spiteful" ahead of their Saudi Arabia showdown on Saturday.

items.title: Amazon billionaire Bezos approached to join consortium seeking stake in Liverpool
items.summary: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has been approached to join a consortium that is in talks to buy a stake in Liverpool.

items.title: Why Chelsea have signed so many Man City academy graduates
items.summary: Morgan Rogers is the latest ex-Man City academy player to join Chelsea and will be reunited with more former City team-mates.
